post_content:
I designed this gear using AutoCAD as part of my regular CAD practice.
 This video shows the complete 2D gear profile and detailing.
Still learning and improving—open to feedback and suggestions.

approved_comment: Impressive AutoCAD skills! As someone working in AI, I’m curious—have you explored how machine learning could assist in automating repetitive CAD tasks? Your gear design could be a great test case for AI-assisted detailing. #AIEngineer #MechanicalEngineering
